expectations.evidence: Explicitly addresses this: "Replace `h-screen` with `min-h-dvh`" with a before/after table showing h-screen -> min-h-dvh. The fix code uses "min-h-dvh flex flex-col items-center justify-center".

expectations.text: Response converts px values to rem-based Tailwind classes
expectations.evidence: Includes a full px-to-rem conversion table (20px->p-5, 24px->p-6, 32px->p-8, etc.) and converts fixed px padding to responsive Tailwind spacing: "px-4 sm:px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-12".

expectations.text: Response adds mobile-first responsive typography classes
expectations.evidence: Headline uses mobile-first responsive typography: "text-3xl font-bold text-center leading-tight sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl". Description also scales: "text-base sm:text-lg md:text-xl".

expectations.text: Response makes CTA button full-width on mobile (w-full sm:w-auto)
expectations.evidence: CTA button explicitly uses w-full sm:w-auto: "<Button size='lg' className='w-full sm:w-auto'>Primary CTA</Button>" within a "flex flex-col gap-3 w-full sm:flex-row sm:w-auto sm:gap-4" container.
